_meta.name: city_registry
_meta.resolved_by: Phase-0 recon (live curl probes). See RECON.md for evidence.
_meta.description: Resolved City tab registry. Every date_col_verify / 'verify' / RESOLVE_AT_BUILD replaced with confirmed live values; ArcGIS FeatureServer URLs + date fields added; FBI ORI filled; LA current-year-311 resolution + crime union seam documented; Census place/county FIPS added to context_layer.

conventions.date_col: all confirmed live 2026-05-31 unless date_col_status says otherwise
conventions.baseline_dataset: union with primary dataset to assemble the trailing-12-month baseline
conventions.dataset_rotates_yearly: resolve the current-year dataset by convention (or union recent years)

notes_global: Socrata app token (SOCRATA_APP_TOKEN) is portal-agnostic: one free token works across all 5 hosts; pass as $$app_token query or X-App-Token header. Keyless = 429s + timeouts on large tables.
Align every Recent to the last COMPLETE month per feed; Chicago crime excludes ~last 7 days (May partial).
Filter IS NOT NULL on issued/created date before bucketing (Seattle permits + ArcGIS permits have large null buckets).

feeds.label: Crimes 2001-present
feeds.note: excludes last ~7 days; latest complete month lags to prior month

feeds.label: 311 (2010-present)
feeds.note: ~38M rows; REQUIRES app token + recent $where filter or it times out

feeds.label: NYPD Complaints
feeds.note: YTD file lags ~1 month; baseline qgea-i56i same col

feeds.label: DOB Permit Issuance
feeds.note: issuance_date is TEXT -> date_trunc_ym fails. Bucket via substring(issuance_date,7,4)||'-'||substring(issuance_date,1,2) and filter IS NOT NULL, OR use dobrundate (real calendar_date, ~1-day proxy).

feeds.label: MyLA311 Cases
feeds.note: RESOLVED: LA retired the 'MyLA311 Service Request Data {year}' series ~Aug 2025 (old h73f-gn57=2025 is dead for current data). Current product = 'MyLA311 Cases {year}'. 2026 = 2cy6-i7zn (date col createddate, live, ~185k/mo). Baseline = 73a2-6ar5 ('MyLA311 Cases March 2025 to December 2025'). Resolve current-year by catalog search: GET data.lacity.org/api/catalog/v1?q=MyLA311%20Cases -> item titled 'MyLA311 Cases {currentYear}'. Do NOT auto-build '...Service Request Data {year}' IDs.

feeds.label: LAPD NIBRS Offenses
feeds.note: UNION SEAM CONFIRMED: baseline y8y3-fqfu complete through 2025-12; live k7nn-b2ep dense from 2026-01. Both keyed on date_occ. Clip baseline to trailing window - both tables hold a few dirty pre-2010 dates from data-entry errors; ignore raw MIN(date_occ). Legacy 2nrs-mtv8 frozen - never poll.

feeds.label: SPD Crime 2008+
feeds.note: CORRECTED: column is 'report_date_time' (underscores), not 'report_datetime'. 2019 RMS change = continuity breakpoint.

feeds.label: Building Permits
feeds.note: Confirmed via columns metadata (a $limit=1 row had it null). MUST filter issueddate IS NOT NULL - large null bucket = un-issued applications.

feeds.label: Miami-Dade 311
feeds.note: STALE: this is the 2023 yearly snapshot (ticket_created_date_time range 2023-01-01 -> 2024-01-01). County 311 is published only as frozen per-year snapshots ('311 Service Requests - Miami-Dade County - {year}'); latest = 2023. NO current County 311 feed exists (alternates b74b1dd0=2018 max, a6b9c3e3=OBJECTID-only, 7cc10915=City-of-Miami footprint max 2024-08). opendata.miamidade.gov is the same ArcGIS Hub org (no Socrata BETA found). Resolve latest snapshot by catalog title pattern; use created_year_month (int yyyymm) for bucketing. Expect Miami Services = stale in P0; Miami likely ships 2-of-3 pillars.

feeds.label: MDC Building Permit
feeds.note: LIVE: ISSUDATE range 1982-09-22 -> 2026-05-21 (current). Plenty for 12-mo baseline + YoY. No date_trunc in ArcGIS: bucket via monthly date-range loop (where=ISSUDATE >= timestamp 'YYYY-MM-01' AND < next-month, returnCountOnly=true) or paginate (resultOffset, maxRecordCount 2000) + bucket client-side. Filter ISSUDATE IS NOT NULL.

feeds.label: FBI CDE (fallback)
feeds.note: ORI FL0130000 resolved keyless from agencies endpoint. Spec's 'MDSO' = this county PD entry (county PD->Sheriff transition not yet renamed in CDE). City-of-Miami-proper PD = FL0130600 if scope flips. DATA series requires free api.data.gov key (FBI_CDE_API_KEY) as ?API_KEY=...; agencies list is keyless. NIBRS from 2022-01 -> 12-mo baseline+YoY feasible once keyed. P0: Safety = not_published/pending until key set.

context_layer.key_required_note: Census now REQUIRES a key for DATA queries (keyless returns 'Missing Key' HTML). Metadata (variables.json) stays keyless.
context_layer.miami_geography_decision: Use Miami-Dade COUNTY (state 12, county 086, GEOID 12086) for Context to match the Pulse footprint (ArcGIS County feeds + FBI ORI FL0130000). City-of-Miami place 1245000 covers only the urban core. MISMATCH: every other city's Context is a place; Miami's is a county. ACS supports county geography for all B-table vars.

miami.note: RECOMMENDED county 12086 to match ops footprint; alt_place is city-of-Miami core if scope flips.

fbi_cde.key_note: free via api.data.gov; needed for data series, not for ORI list
